diario 0.1.0
  • Reference

Store the API token securely for Diario

store_token.Rd

This function securely stores the authentication token using the keyring package.

Usage

store_token(token)

Arguments

token

A non-empty character string containing the API token.

Value

No return value, called for side effects.

Examples

store_token("your-api-token")
#> Token successfully stored.

On this page

diario is part of an ecosystem of R packages for data analysis and computational document processing
developed at the Secretaria Executiva de Monitoramento Estratégico.

Developed by André Leite, Diogo Bezerra Felipe Ferreira, Hugo Medeiros and Roger Azevedo.
